meme.title: The moment I forgot his treats

headlines.h: Opinion: The Professor finds laser pointers distracting (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-29)

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Am I gonna have something to eat or just here to watch you eat, mother?
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
